sentences.text: Hello, this is Josh. I have an appointment this morning with Alison we had it scheduled for eleven AM I'm June call, just want to call. As a reminder, I sent an email as well and a calendar invite. So just give me a call when you get a chance. My cell is six five one seven one seven five six three four again. This is Joseph for my eleven o'clock am appointment time with Alison. I'm give me a call or else. They said we sent a couple emails back and forth and I sent you an email several minutes ago. As a reminder for a call this morning. So let me know if you could still help on I'm using right now or else. If you need to reschedule. Let me know thanks.
